author: airblackbox

text:
What happens under the hood:
✓ Audit chain — every tool call + LLM interaction gets an HMAC-SHA256 signature linked to the previous entry. Modify one record and the chain breaks.
author: airblackbox

text:
✓ Consent gate — classifies tools by risk. Low-risk auto-allowed, critical tools blocked until a human approves.
✓ PII vault — emails, SSNs, phone numbers are tokenized before the LLM sees them. Origi
author: airblackbox

text:
✓ Injection scanner — catches "ignore previous instructions" attacks before they reach the model.
Maps directly to 6 articles of the EU AI Act:
Art. 9 — Risk Management ✓ Art. 10 — Data Governance ✓ A
author: airblackbox

text:
Art. 14 — Human Oversight ✓ Art. 15 — Robustness ✓
100% local. Your code never leaves your machine. No API keys. No cloud dependency. Apache 2.0.
author: airblackbox

text:
Part of the AIR Blackbox ecosystem — open-source compliance infrastructure for AI agents.
Trust layers also available for LangChain, Google ADK, AutoGen, and OpenAI Agents SDK.
GitHub: https://t.co/0n
